calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Robert Diskint, Esq. for Petitioner, Shelly Jajeh, was present in pro per as Guardian at litem for, Mark Jajeh, Jr., a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's fees $3,000.00
Medical expenses $500.00
Costs $1,822.04
A net balance of $6,677.96 to be deposited into a blocked account with U.S. Bank on El Camino in Millbrae, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim
and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account was signed in open court.
